base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of dragonlord_logo_full — a ui (logo) from 1986 dragon quest. Blue Dragon-emblem circular logo — dragon-head silhouette facing right, rendered in cyan-blue gradient. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Blue Dragon-emblem circular logo — dragon-head silhouette facing right, rendered in cyan-blue gradient; Konami/Enix branding element
